title: Sweetspot Global Registry
description: This schema defines the generated portfolio registry of projects, bricks, candidate groups, health scores, and scan findings. Scanner authors, controllers, and dashboard maintainers need it when they produce or consume portfolio-wide state. Read it before changing registry generation or interpreting aggregate counts. Remember that generated registry claims reflect the scanned inputs and must not be edited by hand.

schema_version.description: Schema version that this document conforms to.

generated_at.description: Time when this document was generated, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

scan_project_id.description: Scan project identifier for the record.

scanned_project_roots.description: Ordered scanned project roots values for the record.

root.description: Repository root represented by this record.

id.description: Stable identifier of the scanned project root.

count.description: Number of records represented by the record.

failure_count.description: Number of failure records for the record.

validation_error_count.description: Number of validation error records for the record.

validation_warning_count.description: Number of validation warning records for the record.

unmanifested_count.description: Number of unmanifested records for the record.

candidate_group_count.description: Number of candidate group records for the record.

projects.description: Ordered projects values for the record.

root.description: Repository root represented by this record.

brick_count.description: Number of brick records for the project.

unmanifested_count.description: Number of unmanifested records for the project.

candidate_group_count.description: Number of candidate group records for the project.
